title: BKD-245 Stepmother/Stepson Fucking (The Road To Ashino Hot Spring) Yumi Sakurai
description: Shiro ● Yumi who divorced her husband when she was a student and raised Shiro by herself. I managed to get Shiro into college, but Shiro didn't get used to it and dropped out. Since then, Shiro, who hasn't been motivated to do anything, earns daily money from the current trendy home delivery service using the Internet. Yumi invited Shiro to go on a hot spring trip, saying that he shouldn't stay like this.
